# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processing
  labels:
    app: batch-processing
spec:
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 2
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processing
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processing
    spec:
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      containers:
        - name: processor
          image: your-registry/your-batch-image:latest
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          command: ["/bin/sh", "-c"]
          args:
            - |
              echo "Starting batch processor..."
              ./run.sh
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: "2Gi"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            capabilities:
              drop: ["ALL"]
          env:
            - name: TZ
              value: "UTC"
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
          startupProbe:
            exec:
              command: ["/bin/sh", "-c", "test -x ./run.sh"]
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 30
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command: ["/bin/sh", "-c", "test -f /tmp/ready || exit 0"]
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 2
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command: ["/bin/sh", "-c", "ps -o comm= -p 1 | grep -q ."]
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 2
            failureThreshold: 3
          lifecycle:
            preStop:
              exec:
                command: ["/bin/sh", "-c", "echo 'Stopping...' && sleep 5"]
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
      restartPolicy: Always
      securityContext:
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      volumes:
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir: {}
